overview: Baby Turtle is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 0 HP, 0 physical damage, 10 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.
